nasb.text: She will place on your head a garland of grace; She will present you with a crown of beauty.”

esv.text: She will place on your head a graceful garland; she will bestow on you a beautiful crown.”

cnv.text: 智慧必把華冠加在你頭上， 把榮冕賜給你。”

ccb.text: 她必为你戴上华冠， 加上荣冕。”

csbs.text: 她必将恩惠的花冠戴在你的头上， 把荣耀的冠冕给予你。”
